meaning: n.对开的纸,(原稿的)一页,页码或张数adj.对折的,对开的vt.编页码
examples: Richard told me of three 16th-century folio volumes on alchemy.
Please quote your folio number without fail.
And this year, the show won a Folio Award from the Fair Media Council.
The new Elan Folio cases for iPad are now available at both www.griffintechnology.com and www.threadless.com.
The newly-released Lenovo Folio case is a gem, but alas, only functions with the ThinkPad Tablet.
